title: ‖Ren Hongbin, Secretary of the Party Leadership Group and Chairman of China Council for the Promotion of International Trade, visited the booth of Tianhui Group at the Chain Expo to visit and express condolences
contentHtml:
by"Link the world and create the future together"The first China International Supply Chain Promotion Expo with the theme of11moon28Solstice12moon2held in Beijing. This is the world's first national exhibition with the theme of supply chain.

Highlights of the First China International Supply Chain Expo"chain".500Many Chinese and foreign enterprises and institutions showcased new technologies, new products, and new services, and also demonstrated key links in the upstream, midstream, and downstream sectors.You have me, and I have your cooperation.

At 10 a.m. on December 1, Ren Hongbin, Secretary of the Party Leadership Group and Chairman of the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade, and his delegation visited the Tianhui Group booth at the Chain Expo for visit and guidance.


The leaders visited the exhibition hall of Tianhui Group. Bu Fanpeng, assistant to the chairman of Tianhui Group, described the company's development process, management system and future development plans. The leaders first praised the company's corporate culture and professionalism in the field, and pointed out some suggestions and opinions.

Chairman Ren Hongbin emphasized that interaction and understanding between enterprises should be enhanced so that enterprises can understand their ownWhich part of the "chain" is the key to strengthening communication between enterprises, extending the chain, and complementing the chain in the future development of the enterprise's supply chain.He also wishes Tianhui Group to further enhance its comprehensive strength in its future development.

After the visit and condolences, President Ren Hongbin took a group photo with the participants of Tianhui Group.
titleZh: ‖中国贸促会党组书记、会长任鸿斌莅临链博会天晖集团展位参观慰问
contentHtmlZh:
以“链接世界 共创未来”为主题的首届中国国际供应链促进博览会于11月28日至12月2日在北京举行。这是全球首个以供应链为主题的国家级展会。

首届中国国际供应链博览会看点在“链”。500多家中外企业机构展示新技术、新产品、新服务，更展现出上中下游关键环节你中有我、我中有你的合作。

12月1日上午10点，中国贸促会党组书记、会长任鸿斌一行人莅临链博会天晖集团展位参观指导。


领导们参观了天晖集团的展厅，天晖集团董事长助理卜凡鹏讲述了公司的发展过程、管理制度以及今后的发展规划，领导首先对公司的企业文化和该领域的专业性表示赞扬，并指出了一些建议和意见，

任鸿斌会长强调，应增强各企业间互动与了解，让企业了解企业自身在“链”的哪一条，加强企业之间交流，相互延链，补链，在企业未来供应链发展中至关重要。并祝愿天晖集团在日后发展中综合实力进一步提升。

参观慰问结束后，任鸿斌会长与天晖集团参会人员合影留念。
